packages.name: genswarms-observer
packages.description: Observer scope object: deterministic health detectors (stall, error_burst, budget_block, endpoint_down, pool_saturated) over other swarms' dashboards, with cooldown-deduped Telegram alert cards
packages.note: kind:handler for v0.2 (the :scope object). The full kind:swarm packaging (cron+scope+sender IR) lands when the diagnosis agent (fase 3) matures.
